category_sources: Official MiniUPnP documentation page lists MiniUPnPc API documentation at https://miniupnp.tuxfamily.org/doc/.
source_facts.description says it is a UPnP IGD client library and daemon.
display_name_sources: Official MiniUPnP documentation uses the MiniUPnPc name for the client API.
docs_sources: Official MiniUPnP documentation page provides MiniUPnPc API documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository miniupnp/miniupnp is identified as the UPnP IGD implementation and contains miniupnpc.
PyPI provenance for official miniupnpc wheels points to the public miniupnp/miniupnp source repository.
tags_sources: Official MiniUPnP homepage describes MiniUPnPc as a client library for UPnP Internet Gateway Device services.
source_facts.description identifies UPnP IGD client library and daemon.
